_comment: Claude-Internals Skill <-> Ruflo Task Orchestration Integration
PURPOSE: When Ruflo routes a task that involves Claude Code configuration
(anything under .claude/), this PreToolUse hook fires a non-blocking
reminder to consult /claude-internals before making changes.
HOW TO INSTALL: Merge the 'PreToolUse' array below into the 'hooks'
object in ~/.claude/settings.json, alongside the existing SessionStart
- Exit 0 (no output): Tool does not target .claude/ -- silent pass-through.
- Exit 1 (stderr): Tool targets .claude/ -- proceed but show reminder to user.
- Exit 2 would block the tool (NOT used -- we want a nudge, not a gate).
The matcher uses '(Edit|Write|Bash)' to only fire on tools that can
modify files. The script itself does the fine-grained .claude/ path
detection. Read, Grep, Glob are excluded since they are read-only.
